findings.title: Metrics accumulation across requests
findings.description: self.metrics.attempts is initialized once and never reset. Every call to request() appends to the same list, causing unbounded memory growth.
findings.fix_needed: Reset metrics.attempts at the start of each request() call

findings.title: Connection errors not retried
findings.description: Only httpx.TimeoutException is caught. Network errors (DNS, connection refused) propagate without retry.
findings.fix_needed: Document behavior or add retry for connection errors

findings.title: Unused TimeoutError class
findings.description: Custom TimeoutError defined but never used. Code re-raises httpx.TimeoutException directly.
findings.fix_needed: Remove or use the TimeoutError class

findings.title: get_wait_time() reads state without lock
findings.description: Diagnostic method reads tokens_available without holding lock. Low risk since it's not in critical path.
findings.fix_needed: Consider adding lock or document as diagnostic-only

clear_checklist.correctness: PASS - Token bucket, retry logic, backoff all match spec
clear_checklist.adaptable: PASS - Well-structured with dataclasses and factory functions
